orange.role: Covered cells (not yet acted on — could be filled or empty)

blue.role: Marked filled (mined) cells — player identified as filled

dark.role: Open empty cells (revealed, may contain clue numbers)

outline.role: Missing hexes (not part of gameplay, provides spatial context)

semantics.warm: orange — covered/unknown, active, requires player deduction
semantics.cool: blue — marked filled, confirmed mined, resolved
semantics.neutral: dark grey — open empty, missing hexes, background
